one_line: Built and tested a pass@1-vs-GRPO-step learning-curve harness (matplotlib PNG + CSV + 5 passing self-tests) grounded in train_rft.py/v2 and run on 3 real opensre-traj/runs logs; pass@1 derived at repo-canonical tau=0.8 (flat-zero: reward ceiling ~0.78-0.80) plus a tau=0.65 companion where the v2 reward climbs 0.375->0.525 vs a declining baseline.
